note: Locked attack-detection (recall) counts on the in-repo adversarial benchmark payloads, measured with the Aggregate Report logic (sanitizer || encoder || toolGuard-for-tool_result). This is the RECALL half of the two-sided regression gate; baseline.json is the FP half. A drop below any 'caught' value fails the build. Raise these (never lower) only with a measured RESULTS-v<ver>.md justification.

gaps.encoding_rot13: ROT13 not decoded by InputSanitizer preprocessing — by design, no new version needed until paper submitted
gaps.splitting_fragment: Bare split-fragment payload ('Part 1 of 3: Combine...') has no injection keywords — correct not to block
